GREMLINS-WIZ_POWER.title: 法力
GREMLINS-WIZ_POWER.description: When you have at least [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Wiz[/gold], your next Attack deals [blue]7[/blue] additional damage.
GREMLINS-WIZ_POWER.smartDescription: When you have at least [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Wiz,[/gold] your next Attack deals [blue]{ExtraDamage:diff()}[/blue] additional damage.
GREMLINS-TEMP_HP_POWER.title: 临时生命
GREMLINS-TEMP_HP_POWER.description: Until end of combat, prevents damage to HP.
GREMLINS-BASHED_POWER.title: 重击
GREMLINS-BASHED_POWER.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, this enemy loses HP.
GREMLINS-BASHED_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, this enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP
GREMLINS-BUBBLE_BARRIER_POWER.title: 气泡屏障
GREMLINS-BUBBLE_BARRIER_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold].
GREMLINS-BUBBLE_BARRIER_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
GREMLINS-ENTHUSIASM_POWER.title: 狂热
GREMLINS-CRIPPLED_POWER.title: 致残
GREMLINS-CRIPPLED_POWER.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Weak[/gold] to this enemy, they lose HP.
GREMLINS-CRIPPLED_POWER.smartDescription: This enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP whenever {ApplierName} applies [gold]Weak[/gold] to it.
GREMLINS-INFINITE_BLOCKS_POWER.title: 无限护甲
GREMLINS-INFINITE_BLOCKS_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Ward[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-INFINITE_BLOCKS_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, add {Amount:plural:a [gold]Ward[/gold]|[blue]{}[/blue] [gold]Wards[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-BANG_POWER.title: 砰
GREMLINS-BANG_POWER.description: The next attack you play consumes all [gold]Wiz[/gold] and deals [blue]7[/blue] additional damage.
GREMLINS-BANG_POWER.smartDescription: The next attack you play consumes all [gold]Wiz[/gold] and deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
GREMLINS-MAKESHIFT_ARMOR_POWER.title: 临时装甲
GREMLINS-POLISH_POWER.title: 抛光
GREMLINS-SCATTER_POWER.title: 散开
GREMLINS-SCATTER_POWER.description: The next time you would lose HP, instead [gold]Swap[/gold] to a random Gremlin
GREMLINS-SCATTER_POWER.smartDescription: The next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} you would lose HP, instead [gold]Swap[/gold] to a random Gremlin
GREMLINS-MAKING_MAGIC_POWER.title: 获得法力
GREMLINS-MAKING_MAGIC_POWER.description: At the start of next turn, add a [gold]Bang[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-MAKING_MAGIC_PLUS_POWER.title: 获得法力+
GREMLINS-MAKING_MAGIC_PLUS_POWER.descrip: At the start of next turn, add a [gold]Bang+[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-MAKING_MAGIC_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of next turn, add {Amount:plural:a [gold]Bang[/gold]|[blue]{}[/blue] [gold]Bangs[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-MAKING_MAGIC_PLUS_POWER.smartDe: At the start of next turn, add {Amount:plural:a [gold]Bang+[/gold]|[blue]{}[/blue] [gold]Bangs+[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-WIZARDRY_POWER.title: 巫术
GREMLINS-WIZARDRY_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Wiz[/gold].
GREMLINS-WIZARDRY_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Wiz[/gold].
GREMLINS-AGONY_POWER.title: 苦痛
GREMLINS-AGONY_POWER.description: Creatures in Agony deal [blue]80%[/blue] less damage with Attacks.
GREMLINS-AGONY_POWER.smartDescription: Attacks deal [blue]80%[/blue] less damage {Amount:plural:this turn|for [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.
GREMLINS-CONGA_LINE_POWER.title: 一字长蛇
GREMLINS-CONGA_LINE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and [gold]Swap[/gold] to the next Gremlin.
GREMLINS-CONGA_LINE_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()} and [gold]Swap[/gold] to the next Gremlin.
GREMLINS-ENCORE_POWER.title: 喝彩
GREMLINS-FURIOUS_POWER.title: 发疯
GREMLINS-FURIOUS_POWER.description: Whenever you would gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, instead deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
GREMLINS-FURIOUS_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you would gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, instead deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
GREMLINS-HECKLE_POWER.title: 起哄
GREMLINS-HECKLE_POWER.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-HECKLE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_POWER.title: Gremlins
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_POWER.description:
[gold]Mad Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you are attacked, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Sneak Gremlin[/gold]: 
Whenever you play an Attack, deal [blue]2[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
Attacks that cost [blue]0[/blue] cost deal [blue]2[/blue] additional damage.
[gold]Shield Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you play an Skill, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Fat Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you play an Attack, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Wizard Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you play an Skill, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Wiz[/gold].
[gold]Gremlin Nob[/gold]:
At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Bellow[/gold], [gold]Skull Bash[/gold] and [gold]Rush[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_POWER.smartDescription:
{GremlinVariant:choose(None|MadGremlin|SneakGremlin|ShieldGremlin|FatGremlin|WizardGremlin|GremlinNob):No effect.|[gold]Mad Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you are attacked, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.|[gold]Sneak Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you play an Attack, deal [blue]2[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
Attacks that cost [blue]0[/blue] cost deal [blue]2[/blue] additional damage.|[gold]Shield Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you play an Skill, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].|[gold]Fat Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you play an Attack, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.|[gold]Wizard Gremlin[/gold]:
Whenever you play an Skill, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Wiz[/gold].|[gold]Gremlin Nob[/gold]:
At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Bellow[/gold], [gold]Skull Bash[/gold] and [gold]Rush[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].}
GREMLINS-NOB_POWER.title: 地精大块头
GREMLINS-NOB_POWER.description: Mutate into [gold]Gremlin Nob[/gold] until you run out of [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-NOB_POWER.smartDescription: Mutate into [gold]Gremlin Nob[/gold] until you run out of [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-SHADOW_SHIV_POWER.title: 暗影刀刃
GREMLINS-SHADOW_SHIV_POWER.description: Whenever you play an Attack that doesn't [gold]Exhaust[/gold], gain a [gold]Shiv[/gold].
GREMLINS-SHADOW_SHIV_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you play an Attack that doesn't [gold]Exhaust[/gold], gain {Amount:plural:a [gold]Shiv[/gold]|[blue]{}[/blue] [gold]Shivs[/gold]}.
GREMLINS-TARGET_WOUNDS_POWER.title: 瞄准伤口
GREMLINS-UNFORGIVING_POWER.title: 无情
